chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُنَّ بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْإِمَاءِ وَ لَيْسَتْ مِنَ الْأَرْبَعِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 94 – They (wives of Mut’a) are at the status of slave girls, and are not from the four (wives allowed)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/231)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/231)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُتْعَةِ أَ هِيَ مِنَ الْأَرْبَعِ فَقَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq Al Ashary, from Bakr Bin Muhammad Al Azdy who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan about the Mut’a, is she from the four (allowable wives)?’ So heasws said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 2. AI-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Ishaq al-Ash’ariy from Bakr ibn Muhammad af-Azdiy who has said the following: “In response to my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage) if it is one of the four, he (the Imam) said, ‘No, it is not one of the four.’”
